name: LibreOffice
compose:
name: slashnode-libreoffice
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/libreoffice:7.6.7
    container_name: libreoffice
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5001:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-libreoffice_server_data-config
